case_title: GRIGORIY GLEYSER VS. FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP, et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLEYSER, GRIGORIY AS TO DEFENDANT ZOLLI, LYNNE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-08-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-03-2009 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $933.27 FILED BY GLEYSER, GRIGORIY AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP ZOLLI, LYNNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLEYSER, GRIGORIY AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-10-2000, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZOLLI, LYNNE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $933.27 FILED BY GLEYSER, GRIGORIY AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLEYSER, GRIGORIY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZOLLI, LYNNE $606.26 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $656.26, (1). PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD PLAINTIFF MIKHAIL GLEYSER AS A PLAINTIFF, BY STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES. (2). FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. (3). THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE 933.27, AND ATTRIBUTES 35% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THIS JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZOLLI, LYNNE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
